steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content:
Multiply $12$ by each term inside the parentheses. The outside factor must multiply both terms inside, not only the variable term.
$$12(x+5)=12x+12(5)$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Compute the constant term.
$$12x+12(5)=12x+60$$
The answer is D.
